title: Reserve a table
description: Tell us when you would like to visit. The branch will confirm your reservation by phone or email.

process.requestDescription: Choose your visit time and leave your contact details.
process.managerDescription: The branch reviews availability, calls back if needed, then confirms or cancels the request.

form.title: Your details
form.special_requests_placeholder: Preferred seating, allergies, stroller space, or anything the manager should know.

status.pendingDescription: Your request has reached the branch. A manager will call or email you to confirm the final time.
status.confirmedDescription: The branch has confirmed your reservation. Please arrive at the confirmed time.
status.canceledDescription: The branch could not confirm this request. Please send a new request or call the branch directly.

validation.phone_or_email_required: Enter a phone number or email address.
validation.date_future: Choose today or a future date.

notifications.booking_failed: Could not send the reservation request. Please try again.
